programmes.show_description: Expert interviews, historical analysis and readings of his letters trace the evolution of Mozart's genius and his battle for financial stability in the pursuit of artistic freedom.

programmes.show_name: I Hate Jane Austen By Giles Coren
programmes.show_description: Jane Austen is one of Britain's finest authors. Right? Not according to Giles Coren, who tries to convince us she was just a 19th century chick lit hack.

programmes.show_name: Phil Collins: Going Back To Detroit
programmes.show_description: Genesis hit machine Phil Collins teams up with three original Detroit session guitarists to recreate the original Motown Sound for his 2010 album Going Back.

programmes.show_description: Frank and Denise meet Ian Hislop to discover how Pope and Swift created satire that still influences writers today, before exploring Pope's grotto. (1 of 3)

programmes.show_name: The Story Of British Cinema: The Pioneer Years
programmes.show_description: Learn more about the boom in British cinema as new, pioneering techniques saw productivity skyrocket and creativity flourish within the industry.

programmes.show_name: The Specials Live From Coventry Cathedral
